description: Style NoteClassic slip ons with a brogueing on the stitch sides fresh off arrow's new line. This versatile pair can fancy up a simple ensemble or tone down a blingy one. Style this with one tonal piece in your outfit. Comes with a shoe horn.Product DetailsTapering toed black upper with slip on stylingUpper adhered to the outsoleTPR outsole with a stacked heel and branded grooves on the forefootMaterial and CareLeatherUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to clean this product
